documentation.description:
Logical equality cannot be safely executed on most element types.
Thus, this package should only be instantiated with ghost code
disabled. This is enforced by having a special imported procedure
Check_Or_Fail that will lead to link-time errors otherwise.

subtypes.name: Positive_Count_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Positive_Count_Type is Count_Type range 1 .. Count_Type'Last;

subprograms.name: Element

documentation.description:
To improve readability of contracts, we rename the function used to
access an element in the model to Element.

subprograms.name: Element_Logic_Equal
subprograms.code: function Element_Logic_Equal (Left, Right : Element_Type) return Boolean

parameters.name: Container
parameters.description:
Lift_Abstraction_Level is a ghost procedure that does nothing but
assume that we can access to the same elements by iterating over
positions or cursors.
This information is not generally useful except when switching from
a low-level cursor-aware view of a container to a high-level
position-based view.

subprograms.name: M_Elements_In_Union

documentation.description: The elements of Container are contained in either Left or Right

subprograms.name: M_Elements_Included

documentation.description:
The elements of the slice from L_Fst to L_Lst in Left are contained
in the slide from R_Fst to R_Lst in Right.

subprograms.name: M_Elements_Reversed

documentation.description: Right is Left in reverse order

subprograms.name: M_Elements_Swapped

documentation.description: Elements stored at X and Y are reversed in Left and Right

subprograms.name: Mapping_Preserved

documentation.returns:
Left and Right contain the same cursors

Mappings from cursors to elements induced by M_Left, P_Left
and M_Right, P_Right are the same.

documentation.description:
The high-level model of a list is a sequence of elements. Cursors are
not represented in this model.

subprograms.name: P_Positions_Shifted

documentation.returns:
Big contains all cursors of Small

Cursors located before Cut are not moved, cursors located
after are shifted by Count.

New cursors of Big (if any) are between Cut and Cut - 1 +
Count.

subprograms.name: P_Positions_Swapped

documentation.description:
Left and Right contain the same cursors, but the positions of X and Y
are reversed.

subprograms.name: P_Positions_Truncated

documentation.returns:
Big contains all cursors of Small at the same position

New cursors of Big (if any) are between Cut and Cut - 1 +
Count.

documentation.description:
The Positions map is used to model cursors. It only contains valid
cursors and map them to their position in the container.

generic_instantiations.name: Eq_Checks
generic_instantiations.code:
package Eq_Checks is new
  SPARK.Containers.Parameter_Checks.Equivalence_Checks
    (T                   => Element_Type,
     Eq                  => "=",
     Param_Eq_Reflexive  => Eq_Reflexive,
     Param_Eq_Symmetric  => Eq_Symmetric,
     Param_Eq_Transitive => Eq_Transitive);

documentation.description: Check that the actual parameter for "=" is an equivalence relation

generic_instantiations.name: Lift_Eq
generic_instantiations.code:
package Lift_Eq is new
  SPARK.Containers.Parameter_Checks.Lift_Eq_Reflexive
    (T                  => Element_Type,
     "="                => Element_Logic_Equal,
     Eq                 => "=",
     Param_Eq_Reflexive => Eq_Checks.Eq_Reflexive);

generic_instantiations.name: M
generic_instantiations.code:
package M is new SPARK.Containers.Functional.Vectors
  (Index_Type                     => Positive_Count_Type,
   Element_Type                   => Element_Type,
   "="                            => Element_Logic_Equal,
   Equivalent_Elements            => "=",
   Equivalent_Elements_Reflexive  => Lift_Eq.Eq_Reflexive,
   Equivalent_Elements_Symmetric  => Eq_Checks.Eq_Symmetric,
   Equivalent_Elements_Transitive => Eq_Checks.Eq_Transitive);

generic_instantiations.name: P
generic_instantiations.code:
package P is new SPARK.Containers.Functional.Maps
  (Key_Type                       => Cursor,
   Element_Type                   => Positive_Count_Type,
   Equivalent_Keys                => "=",
   Enable_Handling_Of_Equivalence => False);
